emails.subject: FW: Noresco Credit Contact
emails.body: FW: Noresco Credit Contact To: Ward, Kim S (Houston)

emails.subject: RE: Noresco Credit Contact
emails.body: VERY Cool! I will keep you posted on the structure that we are focusing on. Right now it is Nymex physcial basis. They will lock in basis but not Nymex. We can talk about the potential risks there if you want. Kim To: Ward, Kim S (Houston)

emails.subject: RE: Noresco Credit Contact
emails.body: Awesome. I LOVE index deals, Kimberly!!! I'm running to a meeting up on 38, but will be back within the hour. JRW To: Williams, Jason R (Credit)
